title.ko: 회전피스톤식 또는 요동피스톤식 기계 또는 기관(연소기관 F02; 내부연소에 관한 것 F02B 53/00, 55/00; 유체용 기계 F03, F04)
title.en: ROTARY-PISTON OR OSCILLATING-PISTON MACHINES OR ENGINES (combustion engines F02;internal-combustion aspects F02B0053000000, F02B0055000000;machines for liquids F03, F04)

definition.ko: 기계 또는 기관 회전피스톤식의 것 F01C1/00 - 7/00 요동피스톤식의 것 F01C9/00 제어；감시；안전 장치 F01C20/00 기계 또는 기관의 조합 및 적용 F01C11/00, F01C13/00 공동하는 부재의 구동; 밀봉장치 F01C17/00; 19/00 그외의 세부 및 부속품 F01C21/00

title.ko: 회전피스톤식 기계 또는 기관(공동하는 부재가 평행이 아닌 축을 가진 것 F01C 3/00; 적어도 부분적으로는 탄성변형이 가능한 벽부가 있는 작동실을 가진 것 5/00; 유체링 또는 그것과 유사한 것을 가진 것 F01C 7/00 배타적으로 작동유체가 이송되는, 또는 작동유체가 1개이상의 왕복운동 피스톤을 이송시키는 회전식 피스톤 기계 또는 기관 F01B 13/00)
title.en: Rotary-piston machines or engines (with axes of co-operating members non-parallel F01C0003000000;with the working-chamber walls at least partly resiliently deformable F01C0005000000;with fluid ring or the like F01C0007000000;rotary-piston machines or engines in which the working fluid is exclusively displaced by, or exclusively displaces, one or more reciprocating pistons F01B0013000000)

definition.ko: 그룹 F01C1/30은 그룹 F01C1/02 ~ F01C1/24에 우선함

title.ko: 원호상의 계합을 하는 형식, 즉 공동부재가 병진적인 순환 운동을 하는 것으로서, 각부재가 동수의 톱니 또는 톱니에 상당하는 부분을 갖는 것
title.en: of arcuate-engagement type, i.e. with circular translatory movement of co-operating members, each member having the same number of teeth or tooth-equivalents
of internal-axis type

title.ko: 내부축형식 이외의 것(F01C 1/063이 우선)
title.en: of other than internal-axis type (F01C0001063000 takes precedence)
with coaxially-mounted members having continuously-changing circumferential spacing between them
having cam-and-follower type drive
having crankshaft-and-connecting-rod type drive
having pawl-and-ratchet type drive
having toothed-gearing type drive

title.ko: 상호 물려서 계합하는 형식, 즉 공동하는 부재의 물림상태가 치차의 물림과 유사한 것
title.en: of intermeshing-engagement type, i.e. with engagement of co-operating members similar to that of toothed gearing
of internal-axis type with the outer member having more teeth or tooth-equivalents, e.g. rollers, than the inner member
with helical teeth
the inner member carrying rollers intermeshing with the outer member

title.ko: 내부축형식 이외의 것
title.en: of other than internal-axis type

title.ko: 톱니가 있는 회전피스톤을 가진 것
title.en: with toothed rotary pistons
with helical teeth, e.g. chevron-shaped, screw type

title.ko: 같은 형의 톱니가 있는 것(F01C 1/16이 우선)
title.en: with similar tooth forms (F01C0001160000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 다른 형의 톱니가 있는 것(F01C 1/16이 우선)
title.en: with dissimilar tooth forms (F01C0001160000 takes precedence)

of internal-axis type with equidirectional movement of co-operating members at the points of engagement, or with one of the co-operating members being stationary, the inner member having more teeth or tooth-equivalents than the outer member
of counter-engagement type, i.e. the movement of co-operating members at the points of engagement being in opposite directions
of internal-axis type
of other than internal-axis type

title.ko: 그룹 1/02, 1/08, 1/22, 1/24중 2이상의 그룹에 해당하는 특징을 갖는 것, 또는 이 그룹들의 하나에 상당하는 특징을 가지며 공동부재간의 다른 운동형식을 합하여 갖는 것
title.en: having the characteristics covered by two or more of groups F01C0001020000, F01C0001080000, F01C0001220000, F01C0001240000 or having the characteristics covered by one of these groups together with some other type of movement between co-operating members

title.ko: 그룹 1/02에 규정된 운동과 공동부재간의 상대적인 왕복운동을 가지는 것
title.en: having both the movement defined in group F01C0001020000 and relative reciprocation between the co-operating members
with vanes hinged to the inner member and reciprocating with respect to the outer member
and hinged to the outer member
with vanes hinged to the outer member and reciprocating with respect to the inner member
and hinged to the inner member

title.ko: 그룹 1/08 또는 1/22에 규정된 운동과 공동부재간의 상대운동을 가지는 것
title.en: having the movement defined in group F01C0001080000 or F01C0001220000 and relative reciprocation between the co-operating members
with vanes reciprocating with respect to the inner member
the vanes positively engaging, with circumferential play, an outer rotatable member
the vanes being pivoted on the axis of the outer member
with vanes reciprocating with respect to the outer member

title.ko: 서브그룹 1/22 및 1/24에 규정된 양쪽 운동을 가지는 것
title.en: having both the movements defined in groups F01C0001220000 and F01C0001240000

title.ko: 힌지(hinge)된 부재가 있고 그룹 1/02에 규정된 운동을 하는 것(F01C 1/32이 우선)
title.en: having the movement defined in group F01C0001020000 and having a hinged member (F01C0001320000 takes precedence)
with vanes hinged to the inner as well as to the outer member

title.ko: 힌지된 부재가 있고 그룹 1/08 또는 1/22에 규정된 운동을 하는 것
title.en: having the movement defined in group F01C0001080000 or F01C0001220000 and having a hinged member
with vanes hinged to the inner member
with vanes hinged to the outer member

title.ko: 공동하는 부재의 운동이 축선이 평행이 아닌 회전 피스톤식 기계 또는 기관(작동실의 벽부가 적어도 부분적으로는 탄성변형이 가능한 것 F01C 5/00)
title.en: Rotary-piston machines or engines with non-parallel axes of movement of co-operating members (with the working-chamber walls being at least partly resiliently deformable F01C0005000000)
the axes being arranged at an angle of 90°
with axially-sliding vanes
the axes being arranged otherwise than at an angle of 90°
of intermeshing-engagement type, i.e. with engagement of co-operating members similar to that of toothed gearing
Rotary-piston machines or engines with the working-chamber walls at least partly resiliently deformable
the resiliently-deformable wall being part of the inner member, e.g. of a rotary piston
the resiliently-deformable wall being part of the outer member, e.g. of a housing
the resiliently-deformable wall being a separate member
of tubular form, e.g. hose
Rotary-piston machines or engines with fluid ring or the like
Oscillating-piston machines or engines

title.ko: 각각이 회전 피스톤식 또는 요동 피스톤식인 복수의 기계 또는 기관의 조합(F01C 13/00이 우선; 2개 이상의 펌프의 조합 F04; 유체전동장치 F16H)
title.en: Combinations of two or more machines or engines, each being of rotary-piston or oscillating-piston type (F01C0013000000 takes precedence;combinations of two or more pumps F04;fluid gearing F16H)
Adaptations of machines or engines for special use; Combinations of engines with devices driven thereby
for driving hand-held tools or the like
for driving pumps or compressors

title.ko: 공동부재의 구동수단의 구성, 예. 회전피스톤과 케이싱을 위한 것
title.en: Arrangements for drive of co-operating members, e.g. for rotary piston and casing

title.ko: 맞물리는 전동형식의 것(F01C 1/077이 우선)
title.en: of toothed-gearing type (F01C0001077000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 캠과 플로워(follower) 형식의 것 (F01C 1/067이 우선)
title.en: of cam-and-follower type (F01C0001067000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 크랭크, 유니버설 조인트, 또는 비슷한 요소를 사용하는 것(F01C 1/07이 우선)
title.en: using cranks, universal joints, or similar elements (F01C0001070000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 회전피스톤 기계 또는 기관의 밀봉장치의 배치(밀봉장치 일반 F16J)
title.en: Sealing arrangements in rotary-piston machines or engines (sealings in general F16J)
Radially-movable sealings for working fluids
of rigid material
of resilient material
Axially-movable sealings for working fluids
Sealings for working fluids between radially and axially movable parts
for other than working fluid

title.ko: 기계 또는 기관의 제어, 감시, 또는 안전 장치
title.en: Control of, monitoring of, or safety arrangements for, machines or engines
specially adapted for several machines or engines connected in series or in parallel
specially adapted for reversible machines or engines
specially adapted for stopping, starting, idling or no-load operation
characterised by varying the rotational speed
characterised by changing the positions of the inlet or outlet openings with respect to the working chamber
using sliding valves
using rotating valves
using lift valves

title.ko: 작동실의 용적을 변화시키는 것에 특징이 있는 것(주입 또는 배출 개구부의 위치의 변경에 특징이 있는 것 F01C 20/10)
title.en: characterised by varying the volume of the working chamber (by changing the positions of inlet or outlet openings F01C0020100000)
by changing the form of the inner or outer contour of the working chamber
by changing the eccentricity between cooperating members

title.ko: 압력 또는 유량을 제어하는 밸브의 사용에 특징이 있는 것, 예.배출밸브의 해방(F01C 20/10가 우선)
title.en: characterised by using valves for controlling pressure or flow rate, e.g. discharge valves (F01C0020100000 takes precedence)
using bypass channels
Safety arrangements; Monitoring

title.ko: 구성부품, 세부 및 부속품으로서 타의 그룹으로 분류되지 않은 것
title.en: Component parts, details, or accessories, not provided for in groups F01C0001000000-F01C0020000000

title.ko: 베어링의 배치(베어링구조 F16C)
title.en: Arrangements of bearings (bearing constructions F16C)

title.ko: 윤활(기계 또는 기관의 윤활일반 F01M)
title.en: Lubrication (of machines or engines in general F01M)

title.ko: 가열; 냉각(기계 또는 기관의 냉각일반 F01P); 단열(단열 일반 F16L)
title.en: Heating; Cooling (of machines or engines in general F01P); Heat insulation (heat insulation in general F16L)

title.ko: 회전피스톤(왕복피스톤 일반 F16J)
title.en: Rotary pistons (reciprocating pistons in general F16J)

title.ko: 회전피스톤과 공동하는 타의 부재; 케이싱(회전식 기계 또는 기관 케이싱 일반 F16M)
title.en: Outer members for co-operation with rotary pistons; Casings (casings for rotary engines or machines in general F16M)
Arrangements for admission or discharge of the working fluid, e.g. constructional features of the inlet or outlet
